news.title: 爱泼斯坦关键助手将赴国会作证，被指掌控其财富与秘密
news.title0: Jeffrey Epstein had two key aides - why do they still control his money and secrets?
news.content: 爱泼斯坦的律师与会计师被指在其性犯罪网络中扮演核心角色，现作为遗产执行人控制其巨额财富，并将赴美国国会作证。
news.content0: When the FBI raided Jeffrey Epstein's New York mansion in July 2019, on the day he was arrested for child sex trafficking, agents forced open a large safe to find diamonds, bundles of cash, passports, binders of CDs and hard drives.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 梅根将出席悉尼女性周末静修会，门票高达1400英镑
news.title0: Meghan to appear at £1,400 per person 'girls' weekend' in Australia
news.content: 苏塞克斯公爵夫人梅根将于四月在悉尼出席一场女性专属周末活动，与宾客进行炉边谈话，普通门票起价约1400英镑。
news.content0: The Duchess of Sussex is set to appear at a women-only weekend retreat in Sydney, with tickets starting at A$2,699 (£1,400) per person.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 澳洲设计师凯蒂·佩里商标案胜诉，击败同名歌星
news.title0: Australian designer Katie Perry wins trademark appeal vs Katy Perry
news.content: 澳大利亚时装设计师凯蒂·佩里在与美国流行歌星凯蒂·佩里的多年商标纠纷中赢得终审，其品牌商标得以保留。
news.content0: Australian designer Katie Perry has won her High Court appeal against pop megastar Katy Perry in a years-long trademark case.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 女子涉嫌枪击蕾哈娜比弗利山庄豪宅，被控谋杀未遂
news.title0: Woman charged with attempted murder after shooting at Rihanna's home
news.content: 一名35岁女子被控使用半自动步枪向歌手蕾哈娜的洛杉矶豪宅开枪，当时蕾哈娜与其伴侣在家，无人受伤。
news.content0: A 35-year-old woman from Orlando, Florida has been charged with attempted murder following a shooting at the home of pop superstar Rihanna, prosecutors said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: OnlyFans繁荣背后：菲律宾“聊天员”时薪不足2美元
news.title0: 'Icky and heartbreaking': The $2 per hour worker behind the OnlyFans boom
news.content: 菲律宾“聊天员”时薪不足2美元，冒充高收入模特与粉丝互动并推销内容，自述工作令人不适且涉及道德困境。
news.content0: A Philippines-based woman has described how "heartbreaking" it is to get less than $2 per hour pretending to bemuch better paid OnlyFans models in online chats.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 瑞士公交车火灾致至少6人死亡，警方调查是否人为纵火
news.title0: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
news.content: 瑞士西部克尔泽斯镇一辆公交车起火，造成至少6人死亡、多人受伤，警方正调查火灾是否人为故意引发。
news.content0: At least six people have been killed and others injured after a bus caught fire in a town in western Switzerland, according to police.
news.author: BBC

news.title: Meta收购AI机器人社交网络Moltbook
news.title0: Meta just bought the social network for AI bots everyone’s been talking about
news.content: Meta公司宣布收购AI机器人自主互动的社交网络Moltbook，以在人工智能领域与OpenAI等对手竞争。
news.content0: Meta, the company behind some of the world’s most popular social media platforms, just scooped up a new site – for bots.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 说唱歌手政党在尼泊尔大选早期计票中领先
news.title0: Nepal’s early vote count puts ex-rapper’s party ahead
news.content: 前说唱歌手巴伦德拉·沙阿领导的政党在尼泊尔大选早期计票中大幅领先，有望成为该国最年轻的总理。
news.content0: Rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah’s party gained leads in early counting in Nepal’s general election, far outpacing his other rivals, including the country’s former ​prime minister who was forced to resign after a historic ‌youth-led uprising last year.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 英国警方多次拒绝调查爱泼斯坦案，原因成谜
news.title0: Police in Britain Repeatedly Declined to Investigate Epstein. Why?
news.content: 英国警方在过去十年中多次拒绝调查爱泼斯坦将受害者带至英国并与安德鲁王子发生关系的指控，引发质疑。
news.content0: At several points over the past decade the British police decided not to investigate accusations that Jeffrey Epstein had trafficked Virginia Giuffre to Britain and forced her to have sex with Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, then known as Prince Andrew.
news.author: NYTimes
